name: E-commerce Analytics
description: Synthetic e-commerce dataset for the demo instance: orders and customers. Use it to explore revenue trends, repeat-purchase behaviour, and customer geography without touching any real data source.
when_to_use: Analysing order volume, revenue, or average order value over time.
Segmenting customers by country or purchase behaviour.
Joining orders to customers to study repeat purchases and cohorts.
Demoing Agnes querying against a small, self-contained dataset.
example_questions: What was total revenue per month over the last 120 days?
Which countries have the highest average order value?
How many customers placed more than one order?
What is the daily order count trend?
